verses.text: Mawhna in migilopa' lungsim tawngah thu gen a, amah in Pasian zahtakna nei hetlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ama mawhna kidawkkhia lo a, muhdahna thuaklo ahih manin amah kimawkphat tawm hi
Ama kammalte pen siatna leh khemna vive hi a, pil gamtatna leh hoih gamtatna bei khinta hi
A lupna tungah lumin siat gamtat ding a ngaihsun hi. Hoihlohna lamah amah kibulhtawm a, amah in siatna nolhlo hi
Topa aw, na itna kip in vantung ban a, na cihtakna in vanpi dong banto hi
Na thumanna pen Pasian' mualte tawh kibang a, na thukhennate pen tuipi thuk tawh kibang hi. Mihing leh ganhing na hon hi, Topa aw
Pasian aw, na itna kip manpha mahmah hi. Mihing tate na kha liimah bu uh hi
Na inn sunga na tampite tawh amaute nuamsa uh a, na hoihna gun panin amaute na dawnsak hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nuntakna tuinak nangmah tawh om a, na khuavak sungah kote in khuavak ka mu uh hi
Nang hong theite tungah na itna kip hong zom in la, lungsim thutangte tungah na hotkhiatna hong zom in
A kihisak mite kei hong sukhasak kei in la, migilote, hong hawlkhiasak kei in
Hua lai-ah siatna bawlte a cimawhin kun uh a, amaute kisuncip sukin, thozo nawnlo uh hi.
